name: D/D/D Contract Change
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>更</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Activate 1 of these effects;
● Banish 1 "D/D/D" monster from your Graveyard, and if you do, the attacking monster loses ATK equal to the banished monster's ATK.
● Add 1 Level 4 or lower "D/D" Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand.
